data.description:
## Context / Problem
The approved RUF rollout must clear existing RUF100 stale suppressions and the non-ambiguous RUF hygiene findings before selecting the family. RUF001, RUF002, and RUF003 are explicitly deferred because many flagged Unicode symbols are intentional prose or UI content.

## Approach
First add a config contract test that requires RUF selection and explicit deferral of RUF001-003. Use the pinned Ruff fixer only for safe mechanical edits, review every diff, then manually resolve remaining RUF findings across src and tests. Remove stale noqa comments reported by RUF100 only after confirming the underlying currently-selected rule remains clean. Rejected: broad per-file ignores, because they would admit new hygiene debt.

## Scope
- pyproject.toml
- tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py
- source and test files reported by Ruff RUF diagnostics, limited to mechanical or behavior-preserving changes
- no Semgrep configuration and no Ruff S-family changes

## Testing
- Red: the config contract test fails before RUF is selected and the three deferred codes are explicit.
- Green: Ruff reports zero enabled RUF findings across src and tests.
- Regression: focused tests for nontrivial manual edits and the full default suite pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Ruff selects RUF and explicitly ignores only RUF001, RUF002, and RUF003 from this approved scope; verified by tests/unit/test_ruff_ratchet.py.
- [ ] RUF100 reports no stale noqa comments under the full configured rule set; verified by ruff check src tests.
- [ ] All other enabled RUF findings are resolved without broad new per-file ignores; verified by make lint and configuration inspection.
- [ ] Ruff S rules and Semgrep remain unchanged; verified by the diff.
data.title: Enable Ruff RUF hygiene ratchet
